zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III於1395年出生在法國時，他的父親Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont20歲，母親Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez15歲。他於1426年3月31日與Jeanne de Canny在法國諾爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年8月1日享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III于1395年出生在法国时，他的父亲Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont20岁，母亲Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez15岁。他于1426年3月31日与Jeanne de Canny在法国諾爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年8月1日享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III was born in 1395, in France, his father, Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont, was 20 and his mother, Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez, was 15. He married Jeanne de Canny on 31 March 1426, in Nord, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 August 1470, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III est né en 1395, à France, son père, Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Canny le 31 mars 1426, à Nord, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 août 1470, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III 1395 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont 20 und seine Mutter Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez 15. Er hat am 31. März 1426 in Nord, Frankreich Jeanne de Canny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. August 1470 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III è nato il nel 1395 nel Francia, il suo padre, Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Canny il 31 marzo 1426, nel Nord, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 agosto 1470, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles IIIが1395年にフランスで生まれた時，父Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumontは20歳，母Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biezは15歳であった。1426年3月31日にフランスノードでJeanne de Cannyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年8月1日に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III(이)가 1395년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1426년 3월 31일 프랑스 노르드에서 Jeanne de Canny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 8월 1일 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III nasceu em 1395, em França, seu pai, Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Canny em 31 de março de 1426, em Nord, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1470, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III родился в 1395 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Heer Johan II van Barbacon  Heer van Jeumont было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillipotte de Werchin, Longueville en  Biez, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Canny 31 марта 1426 г. в местности норд, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 августа 1470 г. в возрасте 75 лет.
